default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding new team members Jürgen and Martha, discussing first week focus and key systems/processes.](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Onboarding resources in Notion provide guidance, but flexibility encouraged to absorb information at own pace](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Hands-on experience with workflows and tools (Circle, Airtable, SEMrush, Air Ops) is crucial for learning](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Iterative approach to prompting and workflow refinement is key for scaling quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Recording review and AI-assisted call analysis tools available to gain context on accounts and processes](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Resources and Approach

  - [Notion contains suggested day/week breakdowns, not strict requirements](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Focus on absorbing information through Circle and fabric videos](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Hands-on experience with workflows is critical for understanding](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [AI workshop (4 hours) valuable for mindset, not just step-by-step instructions](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Key Tools and Systems

  - [Airtable: Used as "content OS" for organizing assignments and tracking progress](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [SEMrush: Important for keyword research and competitor gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Air Ops: Organizes multiple workflows sequentially in grids](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Prompting skills valuable for both direct LLM use and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Workflow Iteration and Quality Scaling

  - [Continuous refinement of prompts and inputs based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Goal: Programmatically address recurring issues to scale quality](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Automation frees up capacity for deeper strategy and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Team Structure and Support

  - [Jürgen to work closely with Kyle and director Stewart initially](https://fathom.video/share/2F4TM8NQTn3aDdaozWwKyxf7YjDbBAiM?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
